series_metadata.series_description: Files containing information relative to specific petitions or requests submitted to the agency. Information includes, initial petitions, correspondence to and from parties, investigation materials, requests for information, and case disposition information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Unfair Labor Practice (ULP) Case documents will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days date of case closure. only documents excluded from destruction are ULP initial charge, Investigator''s Memorandum, and Board Directive; they are maintained permanently by agency. ULP Case audio files, cases with probable cause findings, or board opinions are retained permanently due public inquiries and statistical data. Representation (REP) cases are retained permanently due public inquires and statistical data. Mediation (MED) cases will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days from date of case closure. MED case Notice Negotiate, Fact Finding Reports, Conciliation Awards, Board Directives, and Board Opinions are retained permanently due public inquiries and statistical data. ULP, MED, REP cases appealed reviewing court are retained permanently due public inquiries and statistical data. ; Paper: Entire file is retained one (1) year and forty-five (45) days case closure ; Microform: ULP cases dating back further than 1995, destroyed in 2016
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Trash
